name: Enter the Flow State
desc: Double the tokens you earn per tap. You, locked in and 'building' at 2am, deep in the flow — allegedly.

name: Jet Set Huang
desc: He zips up the magical leather jacket, takes the stage, and consumers pay ~30% more per egg. It's not a bubble if the keynote is good enough.

name: Blitzscaling
desc: Every producer outputs +25% per level. Grow at all costs, worry about unit economics never.
